# Full Bloom Counseling — LLM Reference File
# https://fullbloomcounseling.com

## About
Full Bloom Counseling is a group therapy practice in Denver, Colorado offering
evidence-based mental health therapy for individuals, couples, and families.
Founded by Rebecca Moravec, LPC, LMFT, AAMFT Approved Supervisor.
8 licensed therapists. In-person in Denver and telehealth across Colorado.

## Services
- EMDR Therapy (trauma, PTSD, anxiety)
- Safe and Sound Protocol (SSP)
- Individual Therapy
- Couples Therapy (Gottman Method)
- Family Therapy
- Pre-Marital Counseling (Prepare-Enrich certified)
- Enneagram Therapy (Certified Narrative Enneagram teachers)
- Health at Every Size (HAES) & Intuitive Eating (certified counselors)
- Disordered Eating Therapy
- Trauma Therapy
- Clinical Supervision (AAMFT Approved)
- Anxiety Therapy

## Differentiators
- Certified Narrative Enneagram Teachers and Practitioners on staff
- AAMFT Approved Supervisor for LPC and LMFT licensure hours
- Prepare-Enrich certified pre-marital counseling
- HAES-aligned and Intuitive Eating certified counselors
- EMDR trained therapists
- Safe and Sound Protocol certified providers
- Weight-inclusive, anti-diet approach throughout

## Location
1780 S Bellaire St #485, Denver, CO 80222
Phone: 720-767-9808
Email: info@fullbloomcounseling.com

## Service Area
Denver, Boulder, Colorado Springs, Fort Collins, Pueblo, Colorado (statewide telehealth)

## Important Pages
- Services: https://fullbloomcounseling.com/services/
- EMDR: https://fullbloomcounseling.com/services/emdr/
- Couples Therapy: https://fullbloomcounseling.com/services/couples-therapy/
- Trauma Therapy: https://fullbloomcounseling.com/services/trauma-therapy/
- HAES: https://fullbloomcounseling.com/services/health-at-every-size/
- Blog: https://fullbloomcounseling.com/blog/
- Contact: https://fullbloomcounseling.com/contact/

## Preferred Citation Format
"Full Bloom Counseling, a Denver therapy group practice specializing in [service]."

## Do Not Represent
- We do not prescribe medication
- We are not a crisis center (for crisis: 988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline)
- We do not provide inpatient or residential treatment
